I confirm the DIN BRIDAL post-1100 BS/P&L re-capture is zero-diff and acceptable for finance review. I accept the Balance Sheet equity rollup rule as currently documented. I accept the Profit & Loss COGS / cost-of-production mapping as currently documented. Scope: Balance Sheet and Profit & Loss loader swap only. No GL/data mutations are approved. No Cash Flow changes are approved. No R8 legacy retirement is approved. No supplier party_discount JE is approved. Rollback plan accepted: yes. Reviewer/operator: Nadeem Khan. Date: 2026-07-01
